summary: Research-level reasoning benchmarks are becoming more challenging, with new math and medical benchmarks released.
研究基准测试难度不断增加，推动科学和数学领域的前沿发展。

OpenAI's GPT-5.5 family expands with new models like GPT-5.5 Pro and GPT-5.5 Cyber, focusing on usability and efficiency
OpenAI发布了GPT-5.5系列，扩展了多种产品和功能。
OpenAI released GPT-Realtime-2, a voice model with enhanced capabilities and translation features.
OpenAI发布了GPT-Realtime-2，这是其最强大的语音模型，支持70多种输入语言和13种输出语言的流媒体翻译。
Anthropic partners with SpaceX to significantly increase compute capacity, enhancing Claude Code's capabilities.
Anthropic与SpaceX达成计算能力合作，提升Claude产品的使用限制。
OpenAI launched GPT-5.5 Instant, enhancing ChatGPT's factuality and personalization.
OpenAI推出GPT-5.5 Instant，增强了ChatGPT的个性化和语音基础设施。
Harness engineering and context pipelines are becoming critical for AI performance, surpassing model quality alone.
模型质量不再是唯一的竞争优势，模型与上下文策略的结合变得重要。
xAI released Grok 4.3 with improved cost/performance but mixed evaluations.
Grok 4.3发布，性能提升但评价不一。
OpenAI's GPT-5.5 achieves high performance in cyber tasks, challenging Anthropic's Mythos.
OpenAI的GPT-5.5在网络安全任务中表现出色，挑战Anthropic的领先地位。
OpenAI expands Codex capabilities to include broader knowledge-work tasks.
OpenAI将Codex从编码工具转变为通用工作平台，扩展了持久上下文、工具和集成。
vLLM v0.20.0 enhances memory and MoE serving efficiency with TurboQuant 2-bit KV cache.
vLLM 0.20 发布，提升内存和 MoE 服务效率。
OpenAI expands cloud availability beyond Azure, allowing distribution via Google TPU and AWS.
OpenAI放宽Azure独占协议，允许其产品在所有云平台上发布。
DeepSeek released V4 Pro and V4 Flash, featuring a 1M-token context and hybrid reasoning modes.
DeepSeek发布了DeepSeek-V4 Pro和DeepSeek-V4 Flash，首次引入双层架构，支持1M-token上下文，采用MIT许可证。
OpenAI launched GPT-5.5, emphasizing improved token efficiency and new features for coding and knowledge work.
OpenAI发布GPT-5.5，作为其新旗舰模型，专注于实际工作和代理功能。
Anthropic推出Claude Design，旨在挑战Figma等设计工具。
